_source: Google SRE Workbook Ch.5. BR = r / (1 - SLO). For a 99.9% SLO the base error rate is 0.1%; a 1%/10%/100% failure rate burns at 10/100/1000.

cases.description: at-SLO error rate 0.1% for 99.9% SLO burns at 1
1% error rate for 99.9% SLO burns at 10 (budget gone in 3d)
10% error rate for 99.9% SLO burns at 100
total outage (100% errors) for 99.9% SLO burns at 1000
